title: thamnochortus debilis
side_effects: Thamnochortus debilis can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing gastrointestinal issues, including nausea and vomiting, due to its high concentration of toxic compounds. In rare cases, excessive consumption can lead to liver damage and even liver failure. Additionally, improper use of the plant may cause allergic reactions, including skin rashes and itching. If not handled carefully, the plant's toxic properties can also cause cardiovascular problems, including irregular heartbeats and high blood pressure.
